title: OAuth2 refresh token error in Zoho HTTP Request
symptom: When testing the HTTP Request node for Zoho CRM, an error stating 'refreshToken is required' appears, preventing successful authorization.
applies_when: Using Zoho CRM with HTTP Request node
not_this_if: Using the pre-built Zoho CRM node
root_cause: The error occurs due to incorrect configuration of the OAuth2 credentials, specifically the 'Auth URI Query Parameters' where 'access_type' is incorrectly set with a hyphen instead of an underscore. This prevents the proper retrieval of the refresh token needed for authorization.
fix_steps: Edit the OAuth2 credentials in n8n
Ensure the correct Zoho API URL is used: 'https://www.zohoapis.eu/crm/v7/Notes'
Test the HTTP Request node again
agent_instruction: Correct the OAuth2 parameters and use the appropriate Zoho API URL for your region.
